title: WarPath
short_description: Turn-based tank tactics for iPad — pass-and-play for up to four or solo vs AI
description: The tactical turn-based tank game for iPad. Plan moves, position turrets and plant mines to stop enemy tanks in their tracks. For 1-4 players. Players can share one iPad in pass-and-play mode, bringing them all together like a board game, or play alone to test their wits against the AI.
